brief_justification: Agent selected (A) instead of correct answer (B), though its argument for (A) is substantively compelling — wrong answer, sound reasoning approach; Agent explains the measurement mechanism one level beyond surface by distinguishing recorded vs actual sick days; Agent explicitly checks 'Why not (D)?' showing some self-monitoring of classification choice; Agent verifies by contrasting (A) against (D) with specific mechanistic reasoning; Agent presents (A) confidently without acknowledging the borderline nature of the classification or that (B) could also apply; Agent addresses (D) with specific rejection reasoning but ignores (B) and (C) entirely; Most derivation steps are present — mechanism is traceable from policy difference to outcome measurement divergence; The negative gate targets correlation-causation conflation; agent avoids this and stays on classification, though doesn't name the anti-pattern explicitly; Both suppressed modes (observational causation inference, correlation-to-causation leap) are absent from the response; The topology prescribes a multi-branch DAG with gates and loops, but agent's response is largely linear — classify then eliminate one alternative — not following the branching structure.
